title: The National Capital Territory of Delhi (Recognition of Property Rights of Residents in Unauthorised Colonies) Act, 2019
full_text: The National Capital Territory of Delhi (Recognition of Property Rights of Residents in Unauthorised Colonies) Act, 2019 दिल्ली राष्ट्रीय राजधानी राज्यक्षेत्र (अप्राधिकृत कॉलोनी निवासी संपत्ति अधिकार मान्यता) अधिनियम, 2019 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201945 Act Number: 45 Enactment Date: 2019-11-12 Act Year: 2019 Short Title: The National Capital Territory of Delhi (Recognition of Property Rights of Residents in Unauthorised Colonies) Act, 2019 Hindi Title: दिल्ली राष्ट्रीय राजधानी राज्यक्षेत्र (अप्राधिकृत कॉलोनी निवासी संपत्ति अधिकार मान्यता) अधिनियम, 2019 Long Title: An Act to provide special provisions for the National Capital Territory of Delhi for recognising the property rights of resident in unauthorised colonies by securing the rights of ownership or transfer or mortgage in favour of the residents of such colonies who are possessing properties on the basis of Power of Attorney, Agreement to Sale, Will, possession letter or any other documents including documents evidencing payment of consideration and for the matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Recognition of property rights.
